events.text: Assessed the lookahead schedule: Activities A–E finish by day 18 and are complete. Activity G (Plumbing top-out) is on indefinite hold, which directly blocks Rough inspection (I) and transitively blocks everything downstream (J through Q). Electrical rough (F) and HVAC rough (H) share only predecessor E (already complete) and don't depend on G, so they're workable now — written to `/app/answer.json` with `workable: ["F", "H"]`.
